titleStmt.title: SII 5.80: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 80. (A.R. No. 482-I of 1893). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmahçōtsavamusēyunāṇḍu kommarā raṭṭa
ḍikamu Emmaṇḍru nayakulaku pra tisaṁva(ra)tsa(ṁ)
raṁbulu dōyaṇḍēsi vuṭṭamulu prasādicuvāru .
naṭṭava sōmayayayya rājanarāya
nityapērāyaka celukabhū 5 garavubhumi kha 4 mikha
mēlunāyakamu sēyu mucciyaka celuka bhūmi kha 4
garavubhūmi kha 4 gānōju neṟiyamaku celukabhū
mi kha 5 garavubhūmi kha 5 paḍayamuna pē
riyaku celukabhūmi kha 5 garuvubhūmi kha 4
maddaliya mallaniki celukabhūmi kha 3 garuvu
bhūmi kha 3 śaṁkhamuna lōkaniki celukabhūmi kha
3 garuvubhūmi kha 3 gaṇṭavāṇḍunu khāhāḍlavāṇḍru
nu jagaḍavāṇḍunukā berasi celukabhūmi kha 8 ga
ruvubhūmi kha 8 kāsiyabūraṇḍaina cālu
kyasuṁdarayācarikiṁ jelukabhūmi kha 7 garu
vubhūmi kha 7 pinnabūracārikiṁ jelukabhūmi
kha 5 garuvubhūmi kha 5 mēḍacārikiṁ jelukabhū
mi kha 5 garuvubhūmi kha 5 tōḍacārikiṁ celukabhū
mi kha 5 garuvubhūmi kha 5 kommāṟa ṁ jelu
kabhūmi kha 3 garuvubhūmi kha 3 paramēśvaruna
ku śrīmahçōtsavamunaṇḍu śāsanalēkhuṇḍai
na cennācāriki pratisaṁvatsaraṁbulu dōEṇḍu
vuṭṭamulu prasādiṁcuvāru ce
lukabhūmi kha garuvubhūmi kha
Asyōpari na kēna cidbhādhā kartta
vyā yaḥ karōti sa paṁcamāhāpātaka
yuktō bhavati tathā cōktaṁ bhagavatā vyā
sēna svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundha
rāṁ . ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasraṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā bahubhiścānupāli
tā . yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phala
miti .
rājamācāriki celukabhūmi khaṇḍu 5
Akasāla pōtōjunaku celukabhūmi
khaṇḍu 5 .
Digital edition of SII 5.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
